news.title: Cerebras CS-3 coming to AWS Bedrock
news.summary: AWS deploying Cerebras CS-3 for fastest AI inference, 5x token throughput boost via disaggregated architecture

news.title: Yann LeCun's AMI Labs raises $1.03B for world models
news.summary: One of the largest seed rounds ever for European company to build world models

news.title: Moonshot AI Attention Residuals (AttnRes)
news.summary: New method lets transformer layers look back at earlier layers, 1.25x less compute for same training loss

news.title: DeepSeek V4 Released
news.summary: 1 trillion parameters, open weights, 1M context window, multimodal, Apache 2.0 license

news.title: GPT-5.4 Surpasses Human Performance
news.summary: OSWorld-Verified: 75.0% vs human 72.4%, first AI to exceed human desktop task performance

news.title: Google Bayesian Teaching Method
news.summary: Trains LLMs to update beliefs as new information appears, 81% accuracy in recommendation tasks

news.title: Andrej Karpathy AutoResearch Open Sourced
news.summary: AI-driven research loops on single-GPU LLM training setup for iterative code improvement

trends: Multi-agent frameworks dominating research (PMAx, SynthAgent, MLE-Ideator, LexChronos)
World models becoming major focus (LeCun's $1B bet)
Agent governance and safety gaining attention (ICLR 2026 workshop)
Efficient architectures: Attention Residuals, hybrid models (Olmo Hybrid)
Coding agents adoption being empirically studied on GitHub
Long-context race: 1M tokens now standard (GPT-5.4, DeepSeek V4, Claude 4.6)
